venipuncture (e.g., eligibility based on the skilled nursing service of wound care and 
meets all other Medicare home health eligibility criteria), medically reasonable and 
necessary venipuncture coverage may continue under a home health plan of care. 

Sections 1814(a)(2)(C) and 1835(a)(2)(A) of the Act specifically exclude venipuncture, 
as a basis for qualifying for Medicare home health services if this is the sole skilled
